case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY BERKELEY BAIL BOND AGENCY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY BERKELEY BAIL BOND AGENCY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00
CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BONDS. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
